CustomField.description: Maximum number of installment Opportunities that can be created for a fixed-length (non-open-ended) Recurring Donation. Default is 50. Setting this too high may cause DML errors during bulk Opportunity creation. Only applies to legacy Recurring Donations; Enhanced Recurring Donations use the Opportunity Forecast Months setting instead.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Max installment Opportunities for fixed-length Recurring Donations. Default is 50. High values may cause DML errors. Legacy RDs only.
CustomField.label: Maximum Donations
